title: datura stramonium inermis
intro: Datura stramonium inermis, also known as the prickly bittersweet nightshade, is a plant that belongs to the nightshade family and is a variation of the common jimsonweed (Datura stramonium). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anticholinergic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Datura stramonium inermis include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and treat anxiety and insomnia. Datura stramonium inermis is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or extract, and is used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
